name: Kindergarten Art & Creativity — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection through a close look at artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.

lessons.title: Try it together: artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection through a guided practice with artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.

lessons.title: Make or show: artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection through a small creation or demonstration about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.

units.title: Wonder and notice: artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection through a close look at artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.

activities.title: A close look at artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in artistic stories, presentation, and kind reflection.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
